# Arthur Otaviano
**`Front-End Developer`**

I am exploring the development world since I was 12, and working actively 10+ years. I build web apps focusing on great design, responsiveness, accessibility, SEO and user experience. I like to learn new tools and technologies to improve my habilities.

[![Portfolio](https://img.shields.io/badge/PORTFOLIO-0c0a09?style=for-the-badge&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64,&labelColor=0c0a09)](https://arthurotaviano.dev/)
